entity.description: '=Rahab, a name found in the genealogy of our Lord (Matt. 1:5).

nodes.label: Rachab
nodes.description: '=Rahab, a name found in the genealogy of our Lord (Matt. 1:5).

nodes.label: Boaz
nodes.description: The husband of Ruth, a wealthy Bethlehemite. By the “levirate law” the duty devolved on him of marrying Ruth the Moabitess (Ruth 4:1-13). He was a kinsman of Mahlon, her first husband.

verses.text: And Salmon begat Booz of Rachab; and Booz begat Obed of Ruth; and Obed begat Jesse;
